Accessibility - New York Magazine
Gifts for New Parents, That Have Nothing to Do With Baby Because mom can’t wear the onesie. - New York Magazine
These AirPods Pro Are Down to $190 The AirPods Pro add to the features that made the original AirPods so popular. - New York Magazine
What Musicians Aly and AJ Michalka Can’t Live Without “We archive everything from our masters to live performances to photo shoots on these hard drives.” - New York Magazine
20 Things On Sale You’ll Want to Buy: From Champion to Vans Including last-minute gifts mom will love. - New York Magazine

SuChin Pak’s Favorite Gifts from Asian American Brands From affordable skin care, to handmade toys for kids (or kids at heart), to ceramic pieces I love to give teachers, hostesses, and even pets. - New York Magazine
Where to Find the Best Price on AirPods and AirPods Pro If there’s a sale, we’ve found it. - New York Magazine
The Best Gifts for Teachers, According to Teachers From a laminator for a kindergarten teacher to a foam roller for a college instructor — and a lot of gift cards. - New York Magazine
What Are the Best Sunscreens? All-purpose sunscreens to slather on at the beach, before a backyard barbecue, or stash in the glove compartment. - New York Magazine

10 Things That Delighted Us Last Week Including a more sustainable menstrual product, a vintage-style couch with a built-in charger, and model-musician Shaun Ross’s non-irritating shaver. - New York Magazine
This Gift Helped My Dad Gather His Best Memories in a Book It’s a present for both of you. - New York Magazine
What Philadelphia 76er Ben Simmons Can’t Live Without “I don’t know who likes it more: me or my dogs.” - New York Magazine
This Drag-Queen-Approved Eyeliner Is 60 Percent Off It’s a favorite of RuPaul’s Drag Race alum Shangela Laquifa Wadley, who says it’s perfect for drawing a precise eyeliner wing. - New York Magazine
Things on Sale You’ll Actually Want: From Everlane to Dyson Including 14-karat-gold earrings for under $100 and lots of Everlane goodies. - New York Magazine
I Found the Perfect (Verging on Orthopedic) Travel Shoe They’re the only shoes I pack in the summer. - New York Magazine
The Best (Early) Memorial Day Mattress Sales We scoped out all the best pre-Memorial Day mattress deals. - New York Magazine
Do You Really Need Masks and Toners for Your Armpits? Your underarms don’t need a 12-step skin-care routine. - New York Magazine
14 Best Canned and Boxed Soups, According to Chefs Experts share the most delicious (and healthy) soups you can buy online. - New York Magazine
The Cheapest, Nicest Gifts for Dads From Designer Brands Including a Tom Ford tank top, Versace boxer briefs, and a minimalist Comme des Garçons wallet. - New York Magazine
The Best Books About Environmental Justice From a practical guide to farming while Black to a comprehensive history of the conservation movement in America. - New York Magazine

Federal Grand Jury Indicts Ex-Cops in George Floyd’s Death Derek Chauvin and three other former Minneapolis police officers have been indicted on charges of violating George Floyd’s civil rights. - New York Magazine
5 Explanations for April’s Bad Jobs Report Day cares are shuttered, the pandemic isn’t over, UI benefits are generous, and two other theories for last month’s big miss. - New York Magazine
How the White House Polices Language in Washington Including the president’s. - New York Magazine
Warren’s Book Shows She Has No Idea Why Her Campaign Failed Persist is an account of a campaign bubble that doesn’t know it was in a bubble. - New York Magazine

The U.S. Is Playing Catch-Up at Vaccine Diplomacy America can still make a major difference in the efforts to get COVID-19 vaccines into arms globally, but Russia and China have a big head start. - New York Magazine

How Far Along Is New York City in Its Reopening This Spring? COVID-19 vaccinations will be required for SUNY and CUNY students taking in-person classes in the fall, Governor Cuomo announced Monday. - New York Magazine

Scott Stringer Sexual-Assault Allegation: What We Know Lobbyist Jean Kim has accused Stringer of sexual assault and harassment. He’s denied her claim, but has lost key endorsements in NYC’s mayoral race. - New York Magazine

All the Endorsements in the NYC Mayoral Race With the June 22 primary approaching, Democratic mayoral candidates are racking up endorsements from politicians, organizations, and celebrities. - New York Magazine

New Survey Finds Republicans More Eager to Get Vaccinated Enthusiasm has plateaued, but there are positive developments in the rush to inoculate the country, according to the Kaiser Family Foundation. - New York Magazine

DeSantis Signs Voting Restrictions Into Law in Fox News ‘Exclusive’ The Florida governor turned the enactment of yet another restrictive Republican voting measure into a segment on Fox & Friends. - New York Magazine

Tish James Wants In on Jacob Wohl Election Robocall Suit New York’s AG moved to join a federal suit over Jacob Wohl and Jack Burkman’s alleged voter-suppression plot, seeking fines of $2.75 million. - New York Magazine

NYC Still Storing COVID-19 Victims in Makeshift Morgues The remains of 750 bodies are being kept in the trailers, which opened in April 2020 as COVID-19 deaths overwhelmed the city. - New York Magazine

Have Over 343,000 More Americans Died From COVID? A new analysis suggests COVID has killed far more people than the CDC estimates, as well as twice as many globally, but some experts are skeptical. - New York Magazine
The Obama Family’s First Dog, Bo, Has Died The Obamas’ beloved Portuguese water dog, who became a White House celebrity in his own right, was 12. - New York Magazine
Congratulations, You Weren’t Crushed by Space Debris Today That enormous Chinese space rocket has finished its uncontrolled fall back to earth. - New York Magazine

Dogecoin Survives Elon Musk’s SNL Jokes, Will Fund Moon Mission It’s been another whacky 48 hours for the internet’s favorite meme/joke crypto which is not supposed to be worth anything but somehow is. - New York Magazine

GOP Governors End COVID Unemployment Benefits to Make People Go Back to Work South Carolina Governor Henry McMaster has opted out of federal payments because they are often “greater than the worker’s previous paychecks.” - New York Magazine

The Mayoral Debate Over Policing Ramps Up After Times Square Shooting Adams held two press conferences at the tourist destination where three were shot, as the former cop sparred with Yang over how to support the police. - New York Magazine
U.S. COVID Cases Are At Their Lowest Level in a Long Time Fears of a widespread “fourth wave” are receding by the day. - New York Magazine
What We Know About the Colonial Pipeline Shutdown The pipeline, which transports nearly half of the East Coast’s gasoline, was taken offline following a ransomware attack. - New York Magazine

New York City to Offer Vaccinations in Subway and Commuter Rail Stations Anyone who gets a train station vaccination will get either a seven-day MetroCard or tickets for the LIRR or Metro-North. - New York Magazine
FDA Authorizes Use of Pfizer Vaccine for Children 12 to 15 The shot now heads to the CDC, which will determine as early as Wednesday if it can be administered in this age range. - New York Magazine
Andrew Yang’s Insider Campaign - New York Magazine
Less than $5 per month - New York Magazine
杨旭游记 4月29日 19:00 来自 微博视频号 公牛户外电源使用体验，搭配房车、床车、野外露营还是挺适合的#房车# #自驾游# #户外电源# L杨旭游记的微博视频 http://t.cn/A6cEQUa2 - 杨旭游记 - 微博
杨旭游记 4月30日 19:00 来自 微博视频号 杨旭把房车开到了乌海，睡在黄河岸边，当地的羊肉烧麦好吃的很#房车# #乌海# #自驾游# L杨旭游记的微博视频 http://t.cn/A6cmvfZj - 杨旭游记 - 微博
杨旭游记 5月1日 19:00 来自 微博视频号 本想房车里睡觉了，突然车外电闪雷鸣，那就伴着雨声入睡吧#房车# #自驾游# #乌海# L杨旭游记的微博视频 http://t.cn/A6cutFQ7 - 杨旭游记 - 微博
杨旭游记 5月2日 19:00 来自 微博视频号 房车自驾阿拉善，乌兰布和沙漠太刺激，一人一狗快被风沙吹懵了#房车# #自驾游# #阿拉善# L杨旭游记的微博视频 http://t.cn/A6c3jWtq - 杨旭游记 - 微博
杨旭游记 5月3日 19:00 来自 微博视频号 一人一狗房车旅行第170天，洗车加水买甜瓜，特别日子特别过#房车# #自驾游# #宁夏# L杨旭游记的微博视频 http://t.cn/A6cBElTF - 杨旭游记 - 微博
杨旭游记 5月4日 19:00 来自 微博视频号 房车旅行到宁夏石嘴山，当地房价已跌掉一半，一年工资能买一套房#房车# #石嘴山# #房价# L杨旭游记的微博视频 http://t.cn/A6cdzKDH - 杨旭游记 - 微博
杨旭游记 5月5日 20:28 来自 iPhone 11 一会会发一个依维柯底盘售后视频，请大家帮我评理！！！大概1个小时左右点我头像就可以看到视频。 当事人最新回应 - 杨旭游记 - 微博
杨旭游记 5月5日 21:00 来自 微博视频号 6次维修房车依维柯底盘，今天修好了，但他们为了利益还要再拆坏#房车# #依维柯# #修车# L杨旭游记的微博视频 http://t.cn/A6cgS36r - 杨旭游记 - 微博
杨旭游记 5月5日 23:59 来自 iPhone 11 跟大家说下#依维柯售后# 最新情况： 1.店里已将我车拆下来的件（氮氧传感器），从试驾车上又装回到了我车里，我已离开依维柯售后店。店里还没有具体说法和道歉； 2.依维柯售后服务中心在视频发出前曾给我打过一个电话，对相关事做出了解释，但我没有接受。因为当时拆件正在进行中； 3.视频发出后， ...展开全文c - 杨旭游记 - 微博

杨旭游记 5月6日 11:19 来自 iPhone 11 说的是依维柯底盘售后问题，但也给房车厂带来了不小影响，确非本意，目前房车“房”的部分使用良好。此外，非常感谢大家的支持，你们是坚强的后盾，我会继续向依维柯官方给自己，也给关心此事的车友要说法！因之前视频评论私信内容太多，无法及时一一回复，请大家见谅，再次表示感谢了！#依维柯售后# @豪哥房车行 车出问题不可怕，从杨旭出现故障吗后作为房车工厂我们的售后服务第一时间就跟进了。积极协调和安排去那个服务站检查处理。问题出就出在依维柯4s店服务人员态度和服务意识底下导致事件让客户受到委屈，在这里豪哥代表我们房车工厂@巍豪房车 @旌航房车 表示歉意和真诚道歉。房车工厂领导第一时间和依维柯 ...展开全文c +9 25  70 ñ901 5月6日 11:02 来自 iPhone客户端 - 杨旭游记 - 微博
杨旭游记 5月6日 18:24 来自 微博视频号 依维柯房车底盘后续：收到依维柯道歉信，这是我的公开回复#房车# #依维柯售后# L杨旭游记的微博视频 http://t.cn/A6ce8KDG - 杨旭游记 - 微博
杨旭游记 5月7日 18:49 来自 iPhone 11 已编辑 大家好，房车环游中国的第177天。近两天发生的事有些多，视频今天就不发了，好好的休整一下。用文字和大家聊一聊：旅行路上，对于我个人的角色，自己其实一直在寻找一个平衡点，这个平衡点就是“行者”和“博主”的平衡，希望这二者能够彼此相融，而不是互相影响。 大概七八年前，我卖掉公司部分股份 ...展开全文c - 杨旭游记 - 微博
杨旭游记 5月8日 19:00 来自 微博视频号 一觉醒来，陌生人在房车外放了些东西，旅行中的不期而遇很奇妙#房车# #自驾游# #旅行# L杨旭游记的微博视频 http://t.cn/A6csAAX6 - 杨旭游记 - 微博
杨旭游记 5月9日 18:58 来自 微博视频号 飞儿是派来搞笑的嘛说下短期旅程，银川周边不少好地方，这两天好好转转，明天发出《山海情》的闽宁镇视频。之后回北京呆三天，回来后就往甘肃/四川/西藏方向走了，继续咱们的房车环游中国。 L杨旭游记的微博视频 http://t.cn/A6VP2Ffc - 杨旭游记 - 微博
杨旭游记 5月10日 19:00 来自 微博视频号 真实的《山海情》闽宁镇什么样？杨旭自驾房车去一探究竟#房车# #山海情# #自驾游# L杨旭游记的微博视频 http://t.cn/A6VhF4Bw - 杨旭游记 - 微博
